detail: bash /Users/andyxu/Documents/project/wherecode/scripts/go8_subproject_full_cycle.sh stock-sentiment-nextcmd --requirements Build\ a\ local\ runnable\ stock\ sentiment\ analysis\ project\ for\ A-share\ market.\ 1.\ Daily\ opinion/news\ collection.\ 2.\ Sentiment\ classification\ \(positive/neutral/negative\).\ 3.\ Entity\ linking\ to\ stock\ codes\ and\ names.\ 4.\ Industry\ analysis.\ 5.\ Theme/topic\ analysis.\ 6.\ Risk\ tag\ extraction.\ 7.\ Daily\ report\ generation\ \(json\ +\ markdown\).\ -\ Subproject\ should\ run\ independently.\ -\ Subproject\ should\ be\ rebuildable\ from\ this\ requirement.\ -\ Main\ project\ orchestrates\ generation/execution/acceptance. --module-hints crawl\,sentiment\,entity-linking\,industry\,theme\,risk\,report --max-modules 7 --strategy balanced --requested-by v2-run --execute false --force-clean false --stamp 20260311T134300Z --workflow-mode dev --state-path /Users/andyxu/Documents/project/wherecode/project/stock-sentiment-nextcmd/reports/workflow_state.json --ops-log-path /Users/andyxu/Documents/project/wherecode/project/stock-sentiment-nextcmd/reports/20260311T134300Z-workflow-ops.jsonl --reset-dev-state false
